title: PosCopier
description: This small modification allows you to copy your current position with one button.
body:
# PosCopier
A small mod - a big help
## Have you dreamed of being able to copy your location to your clipboard?
Now you can! By clicking one button on the keyboard (C by default) you can copy your current position and then paste it wherever you want.

I know from experience that this is useful on multiplayer servers 😉

The copied position looks like this: **1000/68/200/Overworld**

### This mod is completely client-side, so you can use it however you want and whenever you want
